scripts.test: npm run report:clean && cypress run --reporter mochawesome
scripts.test:headless: npm run report:clean && cypress run --headless --reporter mochawesome
scripts.report:merge: npx mochawesome-merge cypress/reports/*.json > cypress/reports/report.json && npx marge cypress/reports/report.json --reportDir cypress/reports --reportTitle "Relatório Consolidado"
scripts.test:report: npm run test:headless && npm run report:merge
